page_metadata.biotools__summary: Integrated platform that enables robust performance evaluations of binary classifiers in R. Specifically, it offers accurate calculations of ROC (Receiver Operator Characteristics) and precision-recall curves.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Integrated platform that enables robust performance evaluations of binary classifiers in R. Specifically, it offers accurate calculations of ROC (Receiver Operator Characteristics) and precision-recall curves.
